# Ableton Live MCP Seed

This repo is an Arrangement-first Ableton Live bridge + MCP server scaffold.

Read in this order:

1. AGENTS.md
2. docs/project_goal.md
3. docs/codex_project_brief.md
4. docs/architecture.md
5. docs/protocol.md
6. docs/capability_matrix.md
7. docs/mcp_tool_spec.md
8. docs/vendor/cycling74_lom_live_12_3_5/classes/*.md

Do not build a generic session-clip toy. The primary use case is helping an experienced producer reason about a real Arrangement View project.


Local full LOM markdown docs live in `docs/vendor/cycling74_lom_live_current/`. Prefer `LOM_INDEX_FOR_CODEX.md` first, then open specific class files as needed.
